entries.gmTip: Can't see; automatically fails any ability check that requires sight. • Attack rolls against the creature have Advantage; its attack rolls have Disadvantage.
entries.playerTip: Can't see; automatically fails any ability check that requires sight. • Attack rolls against the creature have Advantage; its attack rolls have Disadvantage.

entries.gmTip: Can't attack the charmer or target them with harmful abilities or magical effects. • The charmer has Advantage on ability checks to interact socially with the creature.
entries.playerTip: Can't attack the charmer or target them with harmful abilities or magical effects. • The charmer has Advantage on ability checks to interact socially with the creature.

entries.gmTip: Can't hear; automatically fails any ability check that requires hearing.
entries.playerTip: Can't hear; automatically fails any ability check that requires hearing.

entries.gmTip: −2 to all d20 Tests (attack rolls, ability checks, saving throws) per level. • Speed reduced by 5 feet per level. • At level 6, the creature dies. • Finishing a long rest removes 1 level.
entries.playerTip: −2 to all d20 Tests (attack rolls, ability checks, saving throws) per level. • Speed reduced by 5 feet per level. • At level 6, the creature dies. • Finishing a long rest removes 1 level.

entries.gmTip: Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls while the source of fear is within line of sight. • Can't willingly move closer to the source of its fear.
entries.playerTip: Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls while the source of fear is within line of sight. • Can't willingly move closer to the source of its fear.

entries.gmTip: Speed is 0 and it can't benefit from bonuses to speed. • Disadvantage on attack rolls against any target other than the grappler. • The grappler can drag or carry the creature when it moves, at half speed unless the creature is Tiny or two or more sizes smaller. • Ends if the grappler is Incapacitated, or if the creature is removed from the grappler's reach.
entries.playerTip: Speed is 0 and it can't benefit from bonuses to speed. • Disadvantage on attack rolls against any target other than the grappler. • The grappler can drag or carry the creature when it moves, at half speed unless the creature is Tiny or two or more sizes smaller. • Ends if the grappler is Incapacitated, or if the creature is removed from the grappler's reach.

entries.gmTip: Can't take any action, Bonus Action, or Reaction. • Concentration is broken. • Can't speak. • If Incapacitated when rolling Initiative, has Disadvantage on the roll.
entries.playerTip: Can't take any action, Bonus Action, or Reaction. • Concentration is broken. • Can't speak. • If Incapacitated when rolling Initiative, has Disadvantage on the roll.

entries.gmTip: Surprise: if Invisible when rolling Initiative, has Advantage on the roll. • Concealed: unaffected by any effect that requires its target to be seen. • Attack rolls against the creature have Disadvantage; its attack rolls have Advantage — unless the attacker can somehow see it.
entries.playerTip: Surprise: if Invisible when rolling Initiative, has Advantage on the roll. • Concealed: unaffected by any effect that requires its target to be seen. • Attack rolls against the creature have Disadvantage; its attack rolls have Advantage — unless the attacker can somehow see it.

entries.gmTip: Incapacitated; Speed is 0 and can't change. • Automatically fails Strength and Dexterity saving throws. • Attack rolls against the creature have Advantage. • Any hit from an attacker within 5 feet is a critical hit.
entries.playerTip: Incapacitated; Speed is 0 and can't change. • Automatically fails Strength and Dexterity saving throws. • Attack rolls against the creature have Advantage. • Any hit from an attacker within 5 feet is a critical hit.

entries.gmTip: Transformed into a solid inanimate substance; Incapacitated, can't move or speak, unaware of its surroundings. • Weight increases tenfold; ceases aging. • Attack rolls against it have Advantage; automatically fails Strength and Dexterity saving throws. • Resistance to all damage; immune to the Poisoned condition.
entries.playerTip: Transformed into a solid inanimate substance; Incapacitated, can't move or speak, unaware of its surroundings. • Weight increases tenfold; ceases aging. • Attack rolls against it have Advantage; automatically fails Strength and Dexterity saving throws. • Resistance to all damage; immune to the Poisoned condition.

entries.gmTip: Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.
entries.playerTip: Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

entries.gmTip: Only movement options are to crawl (each foot costs 1 extra foot) or spend movement to stand. • Disadvantage on attack rolls. • Attacks against it have Advantage if the attacker is within 5 feet, otherwise Disadvantage. • Standing up costs half of its movement speed.
entries.playerTip: Only movement options are to crawl (each foot costs 1 extra foot) or spend movement to stand. • Disadvantage on attack rolls. • Attacks against it have Advantage if the attacker is within 5 feet, otherwise Disadvantage. • Standing up costs half of its movement speed.

entries.gmTip: Speed is 0 and it can't benefit from bonuses to speed. • Attack rolls against the creature have Advantage; its attack rolls have Disadvantage. • Disadvantage on Dexterity saving throws.
entries.playerTip: Speed is 0 and it can't benefit from bonuses to speed. • Attack rolls against the creature have Advantage; its attack rolls have Disadvantage. • Disadvantage on Dexterity saving throws.

entries.gmTip: Incapacitated (no actions, no speech, concentration broken). • Automatically fails Strength and Dexterity saving throws. • Attack rolls against the creature have Advantage. • Movement is not prevented (unlike the 2014 rules).
entries.playerTip: Incapacitated (no actions, no speech, concentration broken). • Automatically fails Strength and Dexterity saving throws. • Attack rolls against the creature have Advantage. • Movement is not prevented (unlike the 2014 rules).

entries.gmTip: Has the Incapacitated and Prone conditions; drops whatever it's holding. • Speed is 0; unaware of its surroundings. • Automatically fails Strength and Dexterity saving throws. • Attack rolls against the creature have Advantage. • Any hit from an attacker within 5 feet is a critical hit.
entries.playerTip: Has the Incapacitated and Prone conditions; drops whatever it's holding. • Speed is 0; unaware of its surroundings. • Automatically fails Strength and Dexterity saving throws. • Attack rolls against the creature have Advantage. • Any hit from an attacker within 5 feet is a critical hit.
